text.content: Deke around the defender to your left and try to go in alone.

text.content: This is a classic pass-vs-shoot read on a 2-on-1. The defender has committed to the puck carrier — body weight is leaning left, stick is extended toward your side, and his momentum is going with you. That means the cross-ice passing lane is wide open. Shooting against a goalie who is square to you when a teammate is alone on the back door is the lower-percentage play. The textbook read on a 2-on-1 is: if the defender plays the puck, pass; if the defender plays the pass, shoot. Here, the defender is playing you. Move the puck. Concept: cross-ice read, lane support, pass vs shoot.
